case.title: MISSOURI, K & T R CO v. EVANS

opinion.h: MISSOURI, K & T R CO v. EVANS, 175 U.S. 723 (1899)
MISSOURI, KANSAS & TEXAS RAILWAY COMPANY OF TEXAS, Plaintiff in Error, v. J. M. EVANS. No. 78.
opinion.p: Messrs. James Hagerman and J. M. Bryson for plaintiff in error.
Messrs. Rush Taggart and H. Chilton for defendant in error.

Dismissed with costs, on the authority of Mason v. United States, 136 U.S. 581, 34 L. Ed. 545, 10 Sup. Ct. Rep. 1062; Hardee v. Wilson, 146 U.S. 179, 36 L. Ed. 933, 13 Sup. Ct. Rep. 39; and Sipperley v. Smith, 155 U.S. 86, 39 L. Ed. 79, 15 Sup. Ct. Rep. 15.1

f.p: See 29 C. C. A. 523, 86 Fed. Rep. 1.[ Missouri, K & T R Co v. Evans 175 U.S. 723 (1899) ]
